text:
Created attachment 150024
update file

Update BitchX to 1.2.1 using main sf project page.
Add note mentioning dan is AFK
Remove patches and add them as sed's as I beleive there no point in such pointless patch files. one patch file was merge directly into the core suite.
Remove striping as that cause the issue regarding clang crashing BitchX as well as no need to strip bins.
